name: The Integration Process
body:
[{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview of Guide:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The purpose of this guide is to give an overview of a regular integration process where our professional services team customizes the front-end experience of the prebuilt MJS library in line with the client's desired tonality."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Other Options to integrate are:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The Client Utilize the best practices already prebuilt into the MJS and does not need any additional front-end work."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Front-end customizations are managed by the client internally or by an agency, modifying the prebuilt MJS"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"All components are built from scratch by an agency, utilizing our APIs"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Steps in the Preparation Process"}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#1. Design the Desired Outcome"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) comes with a prebuilt react library ready to be launched - so customizations are not required but commonly applied to match the client's brand tonality."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Here is a "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2196-promo-card-customization","target":"_self","children":[{"text":"Detailed Overview"}]},{"text":" of all the components that can be modified."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#2. Align Designs & Scope Process"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Based on the front-end designs, our Merchant Experts will review functionality, align flows and advice on best practices."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Based on aligned front-end functionalities & styling, our professional services team will define the total customization scope."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#3. Onboard & Integrate Store"}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"📘 Version Control System","bold":true}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"If you are using a Version Control System (e.g. Github) to manage the store's code base, you will need to include our integrations code to your theme/store repository."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Integration steps depend on the platform where we have prebuilt extensions for the largest platforms to simplify onboarding. Detailed instructions per platform can be "},{"type":"a","url":"[NO MATCH]","target":"_self","children":[{"text":"found here"}]},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"In short, we will need to have access to read your product information, place analytics tags to learn the shoppers' behavior & embed the MJS to display our front-end components."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"To do so we will need access to work in your store, receive relevant URLs (+ Preview Password if Applicable) and have the desired theme to work on assigned."}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"👍 "},{"text":"Development Store","bold":true}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"We strongly advise conducting all work, both initial and potential future modifications, in a development environment to ensure proper QA before launching.
"}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Both the development & production stores should be onboarded at this stage. No work will be conducted in production until staging is signed off and launch been scheduled."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#4. Customizations, Performance Optimizations & QA"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Based on the scope, we will prepare the front-end, configure the data & optimize performance."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"This is the biggest step of the process where time will depend on the overall scope."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Average time is 2-4 weeks."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#5. Client Review & Potential Modifications"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once the environment is prepared, we will share it with the client for review."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The environment will be QA'd by our team in both functionality & styling before being shared."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Purpose of this stage is to align any misalignments, ensure all components are in line with expectations & raise final concerns."}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"📘 Providing Feedback
","bold":true}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"It can easily become complex to align design details over email. Our desire is for the client to spend as little time as possible while clearly conveying their desires.
"}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"There exist several great platforms for technical feedback/ticketing, but for a small process like our integration, our experience is that these risk adding rather than removing complexity. We are therefore commonly working with a simple Google Sheet Template to provide feedback:
"}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Please "},{"type":"a","url":"https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1EdcVYFUdf9969D_ET8hO4_FwaXUijEzIhcpZbsdGosg/edit?usp=sharing","target":"_self","children":[{"text":"Access it Here!"}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Make a Copy"}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Fill Out"}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Share with your integration manager once ready
"}]}],"appearance":"neutral"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#6. Staging Sign-Off"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once all feedback items have been resolved, our team will run a final QA and then ask for a final approval of the staging."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"All design input should be covered before moving into launch phase"}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"👍 "},{"text":"Integrating Several Storefronts","bold":true}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"For clients with multiple storefronts/languages, all development work is done for a selected storefront. Once approved, all customizations & settings can be transferred into the remaining accounts. This approach increase efficiency, reduce complexity & ensure quality."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Steps in the Launch Process"}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#7. Confirm Launch Time"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once the final work in the development store has been approved, launch date & time need to be confirmed."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"For US, we advise launching early morning to minimize shopper traffic and have the full product team available if required."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"For Europe, we advise launching before noon (E.g. 10-12 CET)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"For Australia, we advise launching during the afternoon (early morning CET)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"We "},{"text":"strongly advise to NEVER launch during Friday's!","bold":true},{"text":" In the unlikely event that any challenges appear, they should never have a risk to affect the weekend traffic."}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"👍 "},{"text":"Time of Launch","bold":true}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"We advice to not only share date of launch but also time to ensure our integration team reserve the time to be available for any potential question that might arise."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#8. Ensure Account is Activated"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"If not finalized earlier, the account needs to be activated before launch."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The account is easily activated by providing billing details in the Dashboard."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Read more "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/2012-manage-billing","target":"_self","children":[{"text":"Here"}]},{"text":""}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"📘 "},{"text":"Billing is Set on Production Account","bold":true}]},{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Please note that the billing is activated on the Production account and not the Development account."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#9. Production Readiness"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The production account will be prepared with necessary scripts "},{"text":"(the same that has been applied for the development store. Process differ depending on platform).","italic":true},{"text":" Read more "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1989-shopify-app-store-integration-steps","target":"_self","children":[{"text":"Here"}]},{"text":". This is done by either the client, the agency or us."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"We will migrate settings & customizations from the development account to the production environment."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Final QA is conducted."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#10. Production Sign-Off"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Client reviews the production setup and gives final approval."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#11. Launch Procedure"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Client or Agency publish Merchandising Cloud in the active store."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"For a platform with Themes (E.g. Shopify), this is done by activating the theme where we are present."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"During & after the launch, we will monitor and support to ensure everything runs correctly."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"#12. Product Training"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once Launch Date is scheduled, the client will be introduced to the Customer Success team for training."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"This session will cover dashboard control, merchandising, recommendation strategies, efficient management and specific questions."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For Additional questions, don't hesitate to connect with your point of contact or "},{"type":"a","url":"mailto:support@maropost.com","children":[{"text":"support@maropost.com"}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
